name: NeuroVerse
description: Multilingual intelligence + memory + safety MCP server for autonomous AI agents. Features Whisper STT, Coqui TTS, Redis caching, and OpenRouter reasoning.
author: Joshua Ragiland M

steps: cd npm && npm install && npm run build

OPENROUTER_API_KEY.description: API key for OpenRouter (required for reasoning tasks)

OPENAI_API_KEY.description: API key for OpenAI (required for GPT-4o-mini and Whisper STT)

ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.description: API key for Anthropic (required for Claude 3.5 Sonnet tasks)

SARVAM_API_KEY.description: API key for Sarvam AI (specialized Tamil/Hindi models)

DATABASE_URL.description: PostgreSQL connection string (required for persistent memory)

REDIS_URL.description: Optional Redis connection string for scaled caching

SAFETY_STRICT_MODE.description: When set to true, also blocks MEDIUM risk actions. Default: false.
